content.claim: SNI-status children and up to two accompanying persons are entitled to free intercity travel to educational institutions, but travel-support entitlements are contingent on receiving a voucher issued by an Expert Committee following successful SEN assessment.
content.context: Fresh live research through the School network planning lens
limitations: Transport access is gated by prior diagnostic assessment; if assessment capacity is constrained, transport entitlements alone cannot resolve geographic access barriers
The policy does not address within-district or local-area transport where intercity travel entitlements do not apply
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
